name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> No concrete evidence shows the Iris dataset is actually used. In `src/data_loader.py`, `load_dataset()` only returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not import or load Iris data. The trajectory evidence also states there is no direct evidence of Iris dataset execution or processing.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual data standardization. The file only returns a placeholder from `load_dataset()` and a list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` from `build_transforms()`, but there is no real preprocessing code such as fitting/applying a scaler (e.g., `StandardScaler`) to dataset features. The requirement text appears only inside `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, which is descriptive metadata, not an implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only contains placeholder metadata and functions. Although `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` mentions feature selection in a string, there is no actual feature selection implementation in code—`load_dataset()` just returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and no method such as selecting, ranking, or filtering important Iris features is performed.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement an SVM classifier. The file only contains benchmark metadata (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"`; there is no SVM class, no `sklearn.svm` import, and no model construction logic for an actual classifier.

<UNSATISFIED> The file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` exists, but its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than an actual classification accuracy value or metric, so the classification accuracy has not been properly saved there.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The project structure includes `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, and the trajectory evidence explicitly states that the confusion matrix was generated and written to `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` without any reported error during saving. The later image-read failure does not by itself show that the file was not generated or saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/app.py` is not a Streamlit web app implementation. The file only defines constants and a `main()` function returning a dictionary (`{"status": "ok", "notes": ..., "keywords": ...}`), with no `import streamlit`, no UI elements, and no code to display classification results or model performance. Although `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists, the provided `app.py` does not reference or present images from `results/figures/`.
